remarks: Experience the Allure of Luxury Living. Discover the perfect blend of spacious design, modern elegance, and resort-inspired amenities in a beautifully crafted apartment for rent at Allure. Flooded with natural light, this thoughtfully laid-out residence provides ample space to live, work, and unwind in style. A private balcony offers a serene retreat, while the interiors boast beautifully appointed finishes, including stainless-steel appliances, a gas range stove, garbage disposal, dishwasher, and a full-size in-unit washer and dryer.  Inspired by the world's leading resorts and spas, Allure redefines luxury living. Unwind by the Plunge Pool, recharge at the state-of-the-art Fitness Center, or cozy up with a book in The Nook. Entertain effortlessly in the Gourmet Kitchen and Club Desire with friends and family, all while enjoying an extraordinary level of service and convenience. Breathtaking views of Manhattan's skyline provide the perfect backdrop to your urban sanctuary.  Located on the Stamford waterfront, Allure offers direct access to public parks, marinas, and a scenic boardwalk, along with vibrant dining options and over 200 events year-round-from yoga on the boardwalk and 5K races to farmers markets and seasonal pop-ups.  Welcome to a new standard of luxury. Welcome to Allure.
